app.title: Media Studio
app.importMediaHint: Import video, audio, images, MIDI, subtitles (multi-select)
app.previewEmptyHint: Double-click an item in the media library to preview
app.previewSoundHint: Preview uses the browser decoder, not ffmpeg (ffmpeg runs only in Convert). If silent: many browsers block unmuted autoplay—use the player play/volume controls.
app.previewSoundHintFfmpeg: Preview is a transcoded clip (H.264/AAC). If silent: many browsers block unmuted autoplay—use play/volume.
app.previewUnsupported: This format cannot be previewed in the browser
app.previewMidiHint: Open MIDI files in an external sequencer

mediaLibrary.rowHint: Click to select, double-click to preview, drag to timeline; right-click menu

properties.empty: Click an item in the media library to see properties
properties.probeSkippedSize: File too large; probe skipped (browser metadata still shown)
properties.ffmpegScopeNote: Note: After you select media, Properties and preview (audio/video) use ffmpeg.wasm serially for probe and preview transcode; Convert shares the same instance. Very large files skip probe/preview and fall back to the browser.

channelDetail.codecVideoHint: MIME: {mime}; ext: {ext}. Codec needs demux (not parsed in browser)
channelDetail.codecAudioHint: MIME: {mime}; ext: {ext}. PCM layout needs demux
channelDetail.sFormatUnknown: Embedded subtitle format not parsed (often ASS/SRT/PGS)
channelDetail.noteNoDemux: No full demux in browser; track list is heuristic
channelDetail.noteSubtitleGuess: May contain embedded subs; language/codec need tools
channelDetail.noteStillImage: Treated as one still video track for compositing
channelDetail.noteTextSubtitle: External file; align on timeline separately
channelDetail.noteMidi: No built-in synth; export or external playback
channelDetail.noteUnknownKind: Fallback when kind is not A/V/subtitle

convert.title: Conversion settings
convert.pickOutputHint: Pick the output file via the system dialog or file picker; you may edit the file name.
convert.pickOutputFallback: Save dialog is not available; use file picker — the selected file’s name is used as the output name.
convert.startNeedChannel: Enable at least video or audio output
convert.subtitleHintDetected: Properties suggest embedded subtitles may exist; turning off output uses -sn to drop them.
convert.subtitleHintGuess: If no subtitle track was listed, the file may still contain embedded subs; copy may no-op or fail.
convert.preserveMetadata: Copy container metadata (chapters, tags; best effort)
convert.otherHint: Disabling data streams uses -dn; metadata copy depends on source and ffmpeg.
convert.fpsHint: Assumed FPS for frame estimate (display only)

timeline.dropHint: Drag from media library: one clip per channel on each track

dock.splitterHorizontal: Drag to resize bottom dock height
